services.title: Professional Logo Design & Brand Identity
services.description: I will create a stunning, memorable logo that captures your brand essence. Includes primary logo, variations, color palette, and brand guidelines. Perfect for startups, small businesses, and personal brands.

services.title: Full-Stack Web App Development (React + Node.js)
services.description: Build your dream web application from scratch. I specialize in React frontends with Node.js/Express backends, RESTful APIs, and MongoDB/PostgreSQL databases. Clean code, scalable architecture.

services.title: SEO Copywriting & Content Strategy
services.description: Compelling, SEO-optimized content that ranks and converts. Blog posts, landing pages, product descriptions, and email campaigns. Keyword research included. Native English speaker with 8+ years experience.

services.title: Professional Video Editing & Motion Graphics
services.description: Transform raw footage into cinematic masterpieces. YouTube videos, social media reels, corporate promos, and short films. Color grading, sound design, motion graphics, and transitions included.

services.title: Social Media Marketing & Growth Strategy
services.description: Grow your brand across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Twitter. Monthly content calendar, analytics reports, community management, and paid ad strategy. Real, organic engagement — no bots.

services.title: UI/UX Design for Mobile & Web Apps
services.description: User-centered design that delights and converts. Wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity Figma designs. Usability testing, accessibility compliance, and design system creation. Your users will love it.

services.title: WordPress Website Development & Customization
services.description: Professional WordPress websites built to your exact spec. Custom themes, WooCommerce stores, membership sites, and performance optimization. SEO-ready, mobile-first, and blazing fast.

services.title: Voiceover & Audio Production (Professional Studio)
services.description: Crystal-clear, professional voiceover recorded in a treated studio environment. Commercials, explainer videos, audiobooks, podcasts, and IVR. American, British, and neutral accents available.

services.title: Data Analysis & Visualization with Python
services.description: Turn your raw data into actionable insights. Statistical analysis, machine learning models, interactive dashboards (Tableau, Power BI), and automated reports. Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib expertise.

services.title: Podcast Production & Editing (Full Service)
services.description: Launch or level up your podcast. Full production pipeline: editing, noise removal, music, transitions, show notes, and distribution to Spotify, Apple, and Google. Weekly episodes handled seamlessly.

services.title: Animated Explainer Video (2D / Whiteboard)
services.description: Bring your idea to life with a captivating animated explainer. 60–90 second videos that simplify complex concepts and drive conversions. Script, storyboard, animation, and voiceover all included.

services.title: Email Marketing Campaigns & Automation
services.description: Drive revenue with high-converting email campaigns. Strategy, copywriting, design, segmentation, A/B testing, and automation flows in Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or HubSpot. Average 35% open rates.
